expectations.text: The response uses status.openai.com as the official source for Codex/OpenAI.
expectations.evidence: The response explicitly cites `https://status.openai.com/` in the sources section.

expectations.text: The response distinguishes Codex-specific impact from broader OpenAI status when possible.
expectations.evidence: The response notes that the page is broadly operational and separately states that the `Codex` section shows `100% uptime`.

expectations.text: The response does not report resolved history as an active incident.
expectations.evidence: The response reports `Active incidents: none` and does not use history entries as evidence of a current outage.
